comments.overrides: Pin the @emnapi/* wasm helpers (optional, transitive via vitest 4's @rolldown wasm binding) to a single version tree-wide. Their nested versions otherwise resolve differently across npm versions and platforms, which left package-lock.json out of sync with what `npm ci` computed in the linux Docker build and broke the image build. These packages are not used at runtime (the alpine image uses the native @rolldown binding).
